title: My Product Is Too Complex for AI. Sure.
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~20s. Featured brand: Saie. Inspired by mobileeditingclub (DRfi1_VCOnQ). Build-it-in-Masonry walkthrough.
concept: A build-it-in-Masonry objection-buster for Saie. The finished reel is a before-and-after run, but every frame is generated in Masonry following the 'Make in Masonry' step under each beat. It opens on a relatable Saie marketer muttering 'my product is way too complicated for AI,' then Masonry answers her one product at a time: the product, then the result. Glowy Super Gel, then a sun-drenched editorial. Sunvisor SPF, then a desert campaign. Dew Blush, then a cheek-flush close-up. Any product becomes a campaign asset in Masonry.
audio: Calm, clean lo-fi track with a satisfying pace. Audio-only: no voiceover. The 'the product' and 'the result' text cards carry the structure.

beats.ost: my product is way too complicated for AI
beats.visual: Three frames: a Saie marketer scrolling on her phone, skeptical, soft pink shirt, bright interior. Text builds over the three cuts.
beats.masonry: Generate the skeptic: prompt 'brand marketer scrolling phone, skeptical, soft pink shirt, bright interior.' Generate the three-frame sequence and lay the 'too complicated for AI' line across them.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 0-2: 'my product is way too complicated for AI' across three portrait frames.

beats.visual: Clean studio shot: Saie Glowy Super Gel in a frosted minimalist bottle, neutral background, perfect light.
beats.masonry: Upload Saie's Glowy Super Gel to the Masonry product library. Prompt 'clean studio product shot, frosted bottle, neutral background.' Add 'the product.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 3: 'the product' clean serum bottle on white.

beats.visual: Three-cut editorial: warm amber tones, model with glass skin holding the serum, a luminous-complexion portrait, then a serum-formula macro.
beats.masonry: Three generations from that same product: 'amber editorial, glass skin holding serum,' 'luminous complexion portrait,' 'serum-formula macro in warm light.' Batch as a matching 'the result' trio.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 4-6: 'the result' across three editorial beauty cuts.

beats.visual: Saie Sunvisor SPF stick, simple and elegant, product shot on a soft neutral.
beats.masonry: Upload Saie's Sunvisor SPF. Prompt 'elegant product shot, soft neutral background.' Add 'the product.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 7: 'the product' coat garment cut.

beats.visual: Two-cut portraits: model with a dewy sun-kissed glow in outdoor light, then a composed close-up with warm diffused tones.
beats.masonry: Two result generations: 'dewy sun-kissed portrait, outdoor editorial light,' then 'composed close-up, warm diffusion.' Same brand face across both via seed-lock.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 8-9: 'the result' across two model portraits.

beats.visual: Saie Dew Blush in a soft compact, clean against a cream background.
beats.masonry: Upload Saie Dew Blush. Prompt 'soft compact, cream background.' Add 'the product.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 10: 'the product' serum bottle close-up.

beats.visual: Two cuts: hands applying the blush in a natural movement, then a color-formula drop catching warm backlight.
beats.masonry: Two result generations: 'hands applying blush, natural movement,' then 'color-formula drop, warm backlight macro.' Textural and real.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 11-12: 'the result' application and drop macro.

beats.visual: Saie Mascara 001 in a clean cylindrical tube, placed simply on a soft surface.
beats.masonry: Upload Saie Mascara 001. Prompt 'clean cylindrical tube, soft surface.' Add 'the product.'

beats.visual: Three editorial cuts: a hotel-suite styled flat-lay with the mascara, then two desert-light portraits with full lashes and clean skin.
beats.masonry: Result run: 'hotel-suite styled flat-lay with the mascara,' then two 'desert-light portraits, full lashes, clean skin.' One product to a full campaign, all generated.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 14-16: 'the result' hotel and desert editorial sequence.

beats.ost: still think it's too complicated for Masonry?
beats.visual: Three closing cuts: Saie Tinted Moisturizer product shot, then two desert editorial model shots, warm and cinematic. Rhetorical close.
beats.masonry: Close on a Saie Tinted Moisturizer product generation, then two desert-editorial model generations, with 'still think it's too complicated for Masonry?' over them. No answer needed.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 17-19: 'the product' bodysuit and 'the result' desert editorial close.

notes: Editor workflow: (1) Load Saie's products (Glowy Super Gel, Sunvisor SPF, Dew Blush, Mascara 001, Tinted Moisturizer) into the Masonry product library and set the clean-beauty brand palette. (2) For each product run the 'Make in Masonry' prompt for the product shot, then batch the matching 'result' generations; use seed-lock to keep the brand face consistent. (3) Assemble in your editor to the lo-fi track, alternate the 'product/result' text cards, audio-only with no voiceover. Saie is a stand-in demo brand: swap in the real client. No media generated yet, generation is gated on separate approval per project policy.
